HAPPY FATHER'S DAY

MY DAD:

THE ULTIMATE SUPERHERO

MY FAVORITE SUPERHERO TEAM

The Powers He Carries

BRAINS

SMARTER THAN IRON MAN

No suit of armor needed — he builds, fixes, and figures everything out with nothing but his own mind.

Trait: Genius-level problem solving
MUSCLE

STRONG AS THE HULK

Lifts every load this family hands him — heavy days included — and never once complains about the weight.

Trait: Unbreakable strength
WIT

CLEVER AS SPIDER-MAN

Always a step ahead, quick with a joke, and somehow has a clever fix for whatever life swings at him.

Trait: Quick wit & cleverness
NERVE

BRAVE AS BATMAN

Faces every hard thing first, stands guard without being asked, and never lets fear make the decisions.

Trait: Fearless protector

YOU ARE MY FAVORITE SUPERHERO

No cape. No mask. Just you — and that's always been more than enough to make me feel safe, strong, and loved. Happy Father's Day to the real hero of this story.

— Your biggest fan
Made with love for Father's Day 💛
